edges.note: S200 disposition (Matt: mint with PART_OF): the slaying is the climax beat of the Stepstones war

edges.quote: taking his paramour Mysaria with him

edges.note: Fire & Blood: Viserys I Targaryen BANISHES Daemon Targaryen (dispute-quarantine adjudicated S200: OVERRIDE: Runciter has departure only; exile decree exists in the Eustace/Mushroom tale zone)

edges.quote: argued that the prince should be put to death immediately as a traitor
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Lyonel Strong ADVISES Viserys I Targaryen (dispute-quarantine adjudicated S200: parenthetical from Eustace's council account)

edges.quote: the groom's favorite, Ser Joffrey Lonmouth, known as the Knight of Kisses

edges.quote: the blows he rained down on Ser Laenor's champion cracked his helm
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Criston Cole KILLS Joffrey Lonmouth (dispute-quarantine adjudicated S200: public tourney death, flat narration)

edges.quote: He left Breakbones with a broken collarbone and a shattered elbow

edges.quote: having gone over entirely to the queen's party, the greens

edges.quote: she asked that Ser Criston Cole be made her personal protector
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Criston Cole PROTECTS Alicent Hightower (dispute-quarantine adjudicated S200: 'it was said' scopes the displeasure clause only)

edges.quote: ever at Rhaenyra's side at feast and ball and hunt
edges.note: Fire & Blood: Harwin Strong COMPANION_OF Rhaenyra Targaryen (dispute-quarantine adjudicated S200: public court role, flat)

edges.quote: he soon found a new favorite in a household knight named Ser Qarl Correy
